title: [DEPRECATED] DLR B90 Sound Enhancement
description: Sound improvements for ArmoredPiglin & coinc1234’s DLR B90!
body:
# DLR B90 Sound Enhancement Pack
## This pack is being merged into the official DLR B90 mini pack! This pack will not be further updated.
![B90s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed9bfd3b21669206b2c76a32d6af0e128600b198.png)
This pack is based on ArmoredPiglin & coinc1234's B90 pack, but with improved sounds!
